Virat Kohli: Dale Steyn Praises His 38-Year-Old ODI Brilliance

Dec 2, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Virat Kohli continues to defy age, earning praise from former South African pacer Dale Steyn for his exceptional commitment to international cricket.

Most 37 or 38-year-olds hate leaving home, their kids, their dog. But he’s mentally fresh, eager to play for India. You can see it in his running between the wickets, fielding, and diving. He’s mentally young and wants to be here
